name: claude-code-workflows
description: Production-ready development workflows for Claude Code with specialized backend, frontend, and fullstack agents. Includes metronome add-on for preventing shortcut-taking and governance plugin for deployment safety.
scan_summary: Well-structured multi-plugin workflow system with backend, frontend, and fullstack components. MIT licensed, organized into agents/commands/skills directories. No executable scripts with dangerous patterns. .claude-plugin marketplace format properly used. No credential handling or network calls in skill files.

findings_summary.notes: High-quality workflow skill with good separation of concerns across backend/frontend/fullstack plugins. Excellent documentation with clear command structure. Properly uses plugin marketplace format. No security issues found. Integrates with external plugins (metronome, governance) which are third-party but noted in docs.
